response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned hands-on engineer with 25+ years of broad experience, genuine distributed-systems depth from Sociomantic's low-latency microservices work, and current exposure to agentic tooling (MCP code generators, agent frameworks) at re:cinq. However, this is an executive search: the role demands 5+ years of senior technical leadership, a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+, governance of outsourced engineering, and production operation of multi-agent AI systems in regulated financial environments. His resume shows an IC/staff-level trajectory with no people-leadership, org-building, or board-facing experience, only brief fintech exposure (RIDE Capital, 2013-2014), and agentic work that appears to be tooling contribution rather than owning production multi-agent systems with financial consequences. Strong senior engineer, wrong profile for a CTO seat.
strengths: Deep hands-on distributed-systems experience, including low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Sociomantic
Current, practical exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Long, versatile engineering career (web, mobile, embedded) with strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No evidence of engineering leadership: no team management, org scaling (10 to 30+), technical-leadership development, or executive/board communication
No demonstrated production ownership of multi-agent AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Fintech exposure is thin and dated (about 15 months at RIDE Capital over a decade ago); no credit-risk, payments, or compliance-infrastructure depth

key_factors.factor: No senior leadership / team-scaling track record
Lacks production multi-agent AI in regulated environments
Hands-on agentic tooling and distributed-systems depth
